case_title: PAK AUTO SERVICE VS. MARKEDA ANN COTTONHAM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,900.00 FILED BY PAK AUTO SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COTTONHAM, MARKEDA ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-07-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF PAK AUTO SERVICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MUBASHER CHOUDHERY, MANAGER. DEFENDANT MARKEDA ANN COTTONHAM IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF PAK AUTO SERVICES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MUBASHER CHOUDHERY, MANAGER. DEFENDANT MARKEDA COTTONHAM IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAK AUTO SERVICE
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAK AUTO SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED DEC-06-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COTTONHAM, MARKEDA ANN

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COTTONHAM, MARKEDA ANN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAK AUTO SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COTTONHAM, MARKEDA ANN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAK AUTO SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COTTONHAM, MARKEDA ANN $9,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,045.00, FOR UNPAID AUTO REPAIR COSTS & STORAGE FEES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
